# PGS

> PGS delivers occupational medicine solutions nationwide. Pre-employment testing, 24/7 injury case management, triage, telemedicine, and MRO services across all 50 states with 1,500+ clinic partners.

## Contact
- Phone: (555) 000-0000
- Email: operations@primeglobal.co
- Address: PO Box 995 Port Allen, LA 70767, Port Allen, LA 70767
- Website: https://safewithpgs-production.up.railway.app/

## Services
  - Pre-Employment Testing
  - Injury Case Management
  - Request a Consultation

## Service Area
- Primary: Port Allen, LA
- Also serving: greater Port Allen metropolitan area
